presentation.intro_title: Developer with freelance projects in production
presentation.intro_text: I handle end-to-end projects for real clients: from database design to deployment. Experience with REST APIs, data scraping, and management dashboards. Looking to grow in a team where I can contribute and keep learning.
presentation.intro_b1: Backend first: clear API design, robust validation, and well-structured databases.
presentation.intro_b2: Usable frontend: clean interfaces, responsive design, and good UX.
presentation.intro_b3: Professional delivery: documentation, basic tests, and functional deployment.

about.heading: Building solutions that work
about.context: Professional background, technical approach, and what I can bring to your team.
about.p1: Full-Stack Developer with +1 year of experience building backend and frontend solutions for real clients. Specialized in APIs with Python/FastAPI and interactive interfaces with React.
about.p2: I handle projects end-to-end: database architecture, RESTful APIs with FastAPI/Express, responsive interfaces with React, and deployments on Vercel/Render. Every system includes basic tests and technical documentation.
about.p3: I collaborate effectively in teams using Git and agile methodologies. I prioritize maintainable and documented code over quick fixes. Pursuing Computer Engineering to strengthen theoretical foundations.

card1.title: Solid backend
card1.text: I design clear RESTful APIs, efficient data structures, and robust business logic. Python/FastAPI and Node.js/Express.

card2.title: Production verified
card2.text: Systems deployed and running for real clients. I know what it takes to manage expectations, deliver on time, and provide post-launch support.

card3.title: Continuous improvement
card3.text: Engineering while working. I understand the 'why' behind technical decisions, not just the 'how'.
